name: (FUTA) Body Writing Society
description:
After rampant pollution in the Industrial Revolution caused declining male birthrates and mutations in animals, a Matriarchal society was formed. Now in the present times, Anthros, Humans and Monsters all live together in harmony. Men have become something to be cherished and loved. A law was passed that made men able to be written on by women with special markers to remind them just how loved they are everyday

(Warning: High token count and FUTAS)
